title: centaurea nigra subsp. aterrima
intro: Centaurea nigra subsp. aterrima, also known as dark knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea nigra subsp. aterrima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to treat various health issues.
